note: Single-row permission decision output. PermissionLevelId always reflects the strongest granted level for the effective permission. HasPermission can be null when the strongest level is Own/MyReports and no affected target is provided.

exampleScenarios.scenario: Direct grant via strongest level All
Target-dependent strongest level Own without target
Target-dependent grant with matching affected consultant
Normal deny with no matching grant
External consultant switches to alternate permission id
Error case: data permission missing method

fieldDescriptions.HasPermission: Final permission decision. Always false when IsError is true; nullable for target-dependent unresolved checks.
fieldDescriptions.PermissionLevelId: Strongest granted permission level id (All > MyReports > Own > On) for the effective permission when no error, otherwise null.
fieldDescriptions.IsError: True only for validation or consistency errors, not for normal permission denial.
fieldDescriptions.ErrorReason: Human-readable error text. Null when IsError is false.
